strengthening_text: raw 137 PARTIAL ACHIEVEMENT 2026-04-28: 6-repo byte-weighted 75.42% (gap 4.58pp to 80% target). PER-CLASS 2/4 ACHIEVED: text-heavy 83.43% (n6+hexa-lang) + structured-audit 87.14% (hive). REMAINING 2/4 BELOW: small-file 69.10% (nexus, A19 NET-NEGATIVE F-A19-6 TRIPPED) + mixed-real 63.75% (anima+airgenome, 16.25pp gap). Phase 12 P0 deploy LIVE on text-heavy + structured-audit classes (2 deploy ledgers landed). Phase 11 P1 (A20) LIVE-LANDED. Phase 11 P3 (A22) LIVE-VERIFIED — raw 152 self-decoding-fixpoint-mandate VERIFIED at artifact level. Phase 11 P0 (A19) LOAD-BEARING-CONDITIONAL on n6 iter / nexus_proposals_small only. cmix-ban MAINTAINED.
raw_137_partial_recognition: raw 137 80% target is now PARTIALLY ACHIEVED at the per-class level (2/4); aggregate target NOT YET ACHIEVED (75.42% < 80%, gap 4.58pp). Phase 12 P0 deploy LIVE recognized as forward step toward full per-class achievement.

disclosures.note: per-class 2/4 ACHIEVED is honest progress signal but does NOT mean aggregate target met. byte-weighted aggregate 75.42% < 80% raw 137 target. Phase 12 P0 deploy LIVE applies ONLY to the 2 ACHIEVED classes; the 2 GATED classes await algorithmic lift (A20 production-tune + A4-A15 AOT cohort 2).

text-heavy class 83.43% is byte-weighted-dominated by hexa-lang aot_cache_gc.jsonl (1.03MB single file at 94.39% saving). Per-file rate is 2/51 = 3.92% — bimodal. n6-architecture standalone is 29.79%. Honest characterization: text-heavy class deploy LIVE = byte-weighted aggregate target met for combined constituent set, NOT every constituent file.

structured-audit 87.14% has BOTH byte-weighted aggregate AND per-file majority robustness — 21/53 = 39.6% per-file rate. This is the most-confident P0 deploy of the 4 classes. Margin 7.14pp is largest.

small-file class 69.10% (nexus 95 files). A19 federation LIVE FIRE OK but 0pp net contribution under min-selection rule (corpus-conditional — current nexus corpus has only 3 patterns above 256B threshold). F-A19-6 TRIPPED; A19 alone is not the path to 80% on small-file class. Alternative: A20 schema-aware BPE eligibility-gate-bound; production reality 정정 required.

mixed-real 63.75% has largest gap (16.25pp). anima alm_r13_4gate_pass_subset.jsonl 980KB single-file dominator drags aggregate down. airgenome rig_trend_history 95% but cannot offset. Path: A20 + A4-A15 AOT cohort 2.
Phase 11 P0 (A19) is LOAD-BEARING-CONDITIONAL — closure NARROWED to n6 iter / nexus_proposals_small only. F-A19-6 TRIPPED on broader nexus corpus. P0 is not retired; it is corpus-class-restricted.

Consumer with hexa runtime + .hxc artifact alone can verify and decode end-to-end without external library.
